copy.white_first_seat_in_the_list_goes_first: White (first seat in the list) goes first.
copy.select_a_piece_then_a_destination_square: Select a piece, then a destination square per chess rules.
copy.pawns_reaching_the_last_rank_auto_promot: Pawns reaching the last rank auto-promote to queen.
copy.checkmate_ends_the_game_a_draw_refunds_e: Checkmate ends the game; a draw refunds entry to both players.
